name: Shortstack Masochist Zorua - Kira and Shizuka
description:
Ever wanted 2 shortstacks who wouldn't object to being punching bags? You'll lose a lot of money and have 2 fatasses begging for your attention though.

I think that's a fair trade

TW: Possible CnC, abuse, Unova (new york) accent, etc (they'll be the ones asking for you to abuse them)

First ever multiple character bot I did, and also technically the first shortstack bot I've ever done, which is pretty surprising because I LOVE short stacks

I seem to like making pokemon bots where the only clothing they wear is a skimpy ineffective micro bikini, could just be a coincidence though

Made 3 intros for this, one where they're already your pokemon (dialogue based on the image), one where they're robbing you and one where they're just on the malling hanging out

Sidenote: (thankfully) both of them are not related

Artist is @@PlasticPyramid_ on twitter, also sometimes known as plastic_pyramid, may make some more shortstack bots from their art
